metadata.notes: Deductions available only under Old Tax Regime unless specifically mentioned

eligible_investments.name: Life Insurance Premium
eligible_investments.details: Premium payment on life insurance policies

eligible_investments.name: Public Provident Fund (PPF)
eligible_investments.details: Deposits into PPF account, interest rate 7.1% (as of 2025), 15-year lock-in

eligible_investments.name: ELSS Mutual Funds
eligible_investments.details: Equity Linked Savings Scheme, 3-year lock-in, average returns 12-15%

eligible_investments.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana (SSY)
eligible_investments.details: For girl child, interest rate 8.2%, lock-in till age 21

eligible_investments.name: Home Loan Principal Repayment
eligible_investments.details: Principal portion of home loan EMI

eligible_investments.name: Tuition Fees
eligible_investments.details: For up to 2 children, full-time education in India

section_80CCD_1.details: Employee NPS contribution (10% of salary for employed, 20% of gross income for self-employed) — within overall 80C limit

section_80CCD_1B.details: Additional NPS contribution — over and above the 80C limit of Rs.1.5L

section_80CCD_2.details: Employer NPS contribution — allowed in BOTH old and new regime

section_80D.details: Medical insurance premium + preventive health checkup

section_80E.duration: Max 8 years from year of starting repayment
section_80E.details: Interest on education loan for higher education

section_80EEA.details: Interest on home loan for first-time buyer (stamp value up to Rs.45 lakh, loan sanctioned between 01/04/2019 to 31/03/2022)

100_percent_with_10_percent_limit: Government/approved local authority for family planning

section_80GG.details: Rent paid when no HRA received. Least of: Rs.5000/month, 25% of adjusted total income, or rent paid minus 10% of adjusted total income

section_80TTA.details: Interest on savings bank account (for non-senior citizens)

section_80TTB.details: Interest on deposits for senior citizens (60+)

HRA.calculation: Least of: Actual HRA received, Rent paid minus 10% of salary, 50% of salary (metro) or 40% of salary (non-metro)

LTA.details: Leave Travel Allowance — actual travel expenses, twice in a block of 4 years

home_loan_interest_self_occupied.details: Interest on home loan for self-occupied property

home_loan_interest_let_out.details: Interest on home loan for let-out property (no limit but loss from house property set-off limited to Rs.2L against other income)
